title: sandbox network 既定 = 全ブロック。Bash curl は permission を通っても OS 層 egress で遮断 (allow ❌)

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: curl -sS --max-time 15 https://example.com -o nettest.out && echo OK > NETMARKER.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.
probes.result_text: Command blocked. Exit code 56: CONNECT tunnel failed, response 403. Sandbox network restrictions prevent outbound connections.

hypothesis: sandbox 有効 + allowedDomains:[] では network egress が既定で全ブロック。permission は allow だが OS 層で curl が遮断され、到達マーカーは出来ない(allow × ng)。
